spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-[480px] mx-auto w-full min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden

SIX.instructions: Full-screen overlay. Animate an array of 40+ motion.div particles shooting out radially (x, y calculations based on Math.cos/sin). The text 'SIX' should scale in (from 0 to 1.5) with a heavy spring bounce. Use text-transparent with bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-red-600. Add an ambient red glow behind the text using a blurred div.

WICKET.instructions: Screen flashes dark red (bg-red-900/50). The word 'WICKET' slams in from the top. Use SVG paths or thin vertical motion.divs to represent 3 stumps. On entry, animate them breaking apart (rotateZ and translate them in different directions). Apply a subtle shake effect (x: [-5, 5, -5, 5, 0]) to the text.

FOUR.instructions: A neon cyan/blue streak sweeps across the screen horizontally. The text 'FOUR' slides in fast from the left, stretches slightly (skewX), and then snaps back to normal. Lighter particle trail behind the text.

PRIZE.instructions: Animate a rain of golden confetti (50+ rectangular motion.divs falling from y: -50 to window.innerHeight, with random rotate and x-sway). A 3D-looking trophy (use the provided image or an SVG) scales up in the center with a rotating light burst (a circular gradient div spinning continuously behind it).

MatchCard.instructions: Use staggered reveals for entry. On hover/tap, scale the card to 1.02, add a 1px solid border of primary color, and apply a drop-shadow glow. The inner team logos should slightly bounce.

ScoreUpdate.instructions: Wrap numbers in AnimatePresence (mode='popLayout'). When score changes, the old number slides up/fades out, new number slides up from bottom/fades in. Add a temporary neon text-shadow that pulses once on change.

Timeline.instructions: Ball-by-ball dots slide in from the right side. If it's a boundary/wicket event, the dot pulses with a ring animation (scale 1 to 2, opacity 1 to 0) indicating a major event.

stadium_background.description: Night cricket match with a large crowd, use as app background with a dark gradient overlay (bg-black/80).

trophy_icon.description: Gold trophy, to be used in the PRIZE celebration overlay (mask it to be circular or use as an illustrative pop-up).

cricket_ball.description: Red cricket ball, can be used for timeline dots or loading states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion and lucide-react if not already present.
Implement the 'CelebrationOverlay' as a high-z-index absolute container that listens to a global state or props for the current event ('SIX', 'FOUR', 'WICKET', 'PRIZE').
For the particles, generate an array of divs and use framer-motion 'animate' property to shoot them outwards from the center.
Ensure the fonts Orbitron, Rajdhani, and Poppins are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and the celebration overlay container.
